来吧，当他们相爱之际，世界将彻夜狂欢！
郁卿颜后援团团规须知：
1.郁很贪吃，但不会主动向除了邪神以外的存在提出进食需求。
2.郁的身子里不会有活物，一旦发现它有活动状态，那就是小怪物复苏了。
3.郁不会有心动的感觉，除非你能带给他非常人的痛苦。
4.郁不会长出猫耳猫尾，如果你看见了猫耳郁郁，跑，快跑！
5.郁不喜欢被人所觊觎，所以对上郁，你的目光一定要竭尽所能的虔诚与真挚…
警告！警告！目标已进入复苏轨道！
距离祂的来临还有最后一分钟！
倒计时开始！
砰——！
…收容计划失败。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1672299361,"group_id":"7141978230709292044","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93074821117"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7141978230709292044","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.534394e+06"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8},"user_action":{"author":1,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7142087217752687368","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"食用注意：

:"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.3"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7141978230709292044","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+无限流+直播+穿越+系统+甜宠+扮猪吃虎+1v1双洁】
【神秘娇软万人迷】
【大醋精邪神boss】
--
无限游戏的直播间里迎来了一个漂亮的美人，名叫郁卿颜。
--
郁卿颜又娇又软，运气差得离谱，一开始所有人都以为他活不过新人副本，大家都以为他只是个炮灰小可怜。
--
可是后来，直播间的众人才发现，郁卿颜不是炮灰小可怜，而是整个无限游戏都视如珍宝的神明。
--
郁卿颜有一个秘密：他是无限游戏的创造者。
--
深渊中，一双眼睛正贪婪地注视着郁卿颜…
--
“嘘。”
“现在，是神明的娱乐时间。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4bb77c131ede3abd7c9a04b35d0535dc~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"或许别来无恙","author_id":"","book_id":"7141978230709292044","book_name":"疯批神明驾到，野翻无限游戏","book_short_name":"无限娇娇美人","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181828","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1085人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7142065901008306699","read_count":"1085","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"238447"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"157","tags":"双男主,系统,穿越,直播,扮猪吃虎,现代,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/413051de79184d6818b48673fc8f074b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362622&x-signature=%2FdQCPLZ9uLje2u7%2BXc49ZrLwMbY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"93074821117","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"0"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322192342DABBF55046592A863376"}"},"relate_in ,"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":65,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9474,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":20553},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1673160726,"author_reply_time":1673160730,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7264561274229965626","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的超级棒！！！！！真的好喜欢卿卿！本文主角攻是切片，也就是说只要他们还没融合就随时有可能会面对nV1，这对我来说真的很赞！主角两人应该算双洁吧，毕竟那些与卿卿发生夫妻关系的都是邪神的切片。而且由鱼是切片就会有各种各样的设定与play，人鱼、龙、触手、女装等！总的来说，主角两人的设定真的很好，文笔蛮细腻的，主要是在爱情线上建立故事线，真的很推荐这本书！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691412556,"group_id":"7141978230709292044","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"励志想要绿掉原耽中所有的攻","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzWcDV6gx/ORHo16cb6Eh7A=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/36650daf52474877b0e7650049a8d635~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710276&x-signature=P2bl6qF2d4v8w%2BvQO%2B1BthztbZQ%3D","user_id":"3981328173","user_name":"树上的一片树叶儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3981328173","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7141978230709292044","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主
